description: Language-specific configuration for [Language] projects using the process framework. Copy this file to languages-config/{language}-config.json and fill in the values.

testing._comment_baseCommand: REQUIRED. The command to run tests. Placeholders: {testDir} = test directory from project-config.json, {module} = project name from project-config.json.
testing.baseCommand: [test-runner-command, e.g. 'python -m pytest' or 'dart test' or 'go test']
testing._comment_coverageArgs: REQUIRED. Arguments appended to baseCommand for coverage reporting. Use {module} and {testDir} placeholders.
testing._comment_coverageFullArgs: OPTIONAL. Extended coverage arguments for standalone coverage generation (XML output, term-missing, etc.). Falls back to coverageArgs if omitted.
testing._comment_discoveryCommand: REQUIRED. Command to collect/discover tests without running them. Used by Validate-TestTracking.ps1.
testing._comment_discoveryOutputPattern: REQUIRED. Regex to extract file path from each line of discovery output. Must have capture group 1 = file path. Used by Validate-TestTracking.ps1 Check 6.
testing.discoveryOutputPattern: [regex, e.g. '^(.+\\.py)::' for pytest or '^(.+\\.dart)' for dart]
testing._comment_testFileExtension: REQUIRED. File extension for test files (including dot). Used by Validate-TestTracking.ps1 Check 2.
testing._comment_testFileNamePattern: REQUIRED. Naming pattern for new test files created by New-TestFile.ps1. Use {name} as placeholder for the sanitized test name. Extension is appended from testFileExtension. Examples: 'test_{name}' (Python), '{name}_test' (Dart/Go), '{name}.test' (JS/Jest), '{name}Test' (Java).
testing._comment_testFileExclusions: OPTIONAL. File/directory names to exclude when scanning for test files. Omit or use empty array if none.
testing._comment_lintCommand: OPTIONAL. Linting command for test files. Omit if not applicable. Use {testDir} placeholder.
testing._comment_stopOnFirstFailure: REQUIRED. Flag to stop test execution on first failure. Used by -Quick mode.
testing.stopOnFirstFailure: [flag, e.g. '-x' for pytest, '--fail-fast' for dart test]
testing._comment_verboseFlag: REQUIRED. Flag for verbose test output.
testing.verboseFlag: [flag, e.g. '-v' for pytest, '--reporter=expanded' for dart test]
testing._comment_markers: OPTIONAL. Test marker/tag syntax for filtering test subsets. Keys are semantic names, values are CLI arguments.
